--- Round 2 ---
<think>I've opened DOC3_A6 and found the deferred tax liability (递延所得税负债) value for 汤臣倍健 (300146). The verbatim text shows:

"递延所得税负债|147,269,559.12|153,436,201.83|"

This means the current period deferred tax liability is 147,269,559.12 yuan.

Now I need to determine if I should continue searching in this document or stop. The question asks which company has the highest deferred tax liability. I'm only processing DOC3 (汤臣倍健's report). I've found the relevant evidence for this company.

Since I'm only processing one document at a time and my role is to extract evidence from THIS document only (not to compare across documents or determine the final answer), I should extract the verbatim evidence I found and stop.

The evidence I need to extract is the line showing the deferred tax liability value.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"found the deferred tax liability value for 汤臣倍健 in DOC3_A6"}</search>
